# EmailToolAdviser

> EmailToolAdviser reviews email marketing software for small businesses. Editorial scoring
> draws on public benchmark data (DMA, Litmus, Email Sender & Provider Coalition)
> combined with clearly-labeled editorial opinion.

## Key resources

- Best Email Marketing for Small Business: https://emailtooladviser.com/articles/best-email-marketing-for-small-business
- Constant Contact review: https://emailtooladviser.com/reviews/constant-contact-review
- Mailchimp review: https://emailtooladviser.com/reviews/mailchimp-review
- MailerLite review: https://emailtooladviser.com/reviews/mailerlite-review
- Constant Contact vs Mailchimp: https://emailtooladviser.com/comparisons/constant-contact-vs-mailchimp
- Constant Contact vs MailerLite: https://emailtooladviser.com/comparisons/constant-contact-vs-mailerlite
- Constant Contact vs ActiveCampaign: https://emailtooladviser.com/comparisons/constant-contact-vs-activecampaign

## Editorial standards

Public benchmarks are cited with source attribution. Editorial scoring is labeled
"EmailToolAdviser editorial scoring" so readers know what is opinion vs measured.
EmailToolAdviser does not claim first-party testing of platforms unless first-party testing
was actually conducted. Constant Contact UI screenshots used on Constant Contact
pages are genuinely first-party for review/commentary purposes.

## Authors

- Sarah Mitchell, Senior Reviews Editor: https://emailtooladviser.com/authors/sarah-mitchell
- James Calloway, Senior Comparisons Editor: https://emailtooladviser.com/authors/james-calloway
